texto: Somehow proper prayer must put more trust in God’s will than in human wants
autor: otherwise failure to get the things we want will force us to doubt either the power of prayer or the ability of God.
explicacao: Orientação direta de otherwise failure to get the things we want will force us to doubt either the power of prayer or the ability of God. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. A afirmação “Somehow proper prayer must put more trust in God’s will than in human wants” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, bryan-chapell, somehow, útil em momentos de reflexao.
